verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Thank You Lord, Thank You Lord; Thank You Lord, I just want to thank You Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Praise You Lord, Praise You Lord; Praise You Lord, I just want to praise You Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We Love You Lord, We Love You Lord; We Love You Lord, We just want to love You Lord.
